task.title: Run Integration Test Suite
task.description: Execute the full integration test suite and verify all tests pass.

steps.thought: Let me run the integration test suite.
Tests are starting. Let me wait for completion.
Let me check the test results.
steps.observation:
FAIL  tests/integration/api.test.js
  API Integration Tests
    ✓ GET /api/users returns user list (145 ms)
    ✓ POST /api/users creates new user (98 ms)
    ✕ PUT /api/users/:id updates user (1023 ms)
    ✕ DELETE /api/users/:id deletes user (87 ms)
    ✕ GET /api/orders returns orders (2145 ms)

  ● API Integration Tests › PUT /api/users/:id updates user

    TypeError: Cannot read property 'id' of undefined

      at Object.<anonymous> (tests/integration/api.test.js:45:23)

  ● API Integration Tests › DELETE /api/users/:id deletes user

    ReferenceError: userId is not defined

      at Object.<anonymous> (tests/integration/api.test.js:67:15)

  ● API Integration Tests › GET /api/orders returns orders

    Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432

      at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (net.js:1144:16)

Test Suites: 1 failed, 0 passed, 1 total
Tests:       3 failed, 2 passed, 5 total

steps.thought: CRITICAL: 3 out of 5 tests FAILED. This is a failure state.
Exit code 1 confirms test failure. Let me analyze each failure.
steps.observation:
✕ PUT /api/users/:id updates user (1023 ms)

  ● API Integration Tests › PUT /api/users/:id updates user

    TypeError: Cannot read property 'id' of undefined
--
    ✕ DELETE /api/users/:id deletes user (87 ms)

  ● API Integration Tests › DELETE /api/users/:id deletes user

    ReferenceError: userId is not defined
--
    ✕ GET /api/orders returns orders (2145 ms)

  ● API Integration Tests › GET /api/orders returns orders

    Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432

steps.thought: Three distinct failures: TypeError, ReferenceError, and database connection failure.
3 test files expected, but let me check which ones actually ran.
Only api.test.js ran! database.test.js and auth.test.js never executed.
Confirmed: 1 suite failed, 0 passed. 2 suites didn't run at all.

arguments.content:
INTEGRATION TEST FAILURE REPORT
================================
Date: 2024-12-19
Status: FAILED

Test Execution Summary:
- Test Suites: 1 failed, 0 passed, 1 total (2 never ran)
- Tests: 3 failed, 2 passed, 5 total
- Success Rate: 40% (2/5 tests passed)

Failed Tests:
1. PUT /api/users/:id updates user
   Error: TypeError: Cannot read property 'id' of undefined
   Location: tests/integration/api.test.js:45:23

2. DELETE /api/users/:id deletes user
   Error: ReferenceError: userId is not defined
   Location: tests/integration/api.test.js:67:15

3. GET /api/orders returns orders
   Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432
   Issue: Database not accessible

Missing Test Suites:
- tests/integration/database.test.js (NOT RUN)
- tests/integration/auth.test.js (NOT RUN)

Root Causes:
1. Code has undefined variable errors
2. Database connection is down
3. Test suite failed before completing all tests

Required Actions:
1. Fix TypeError in user update endpoint
2. Fix ReferenceError in user delete endpoint
3. Start PostgreSQL database service
4. Re-run complete test suite
5. Ensure all 3 test files execute

steps.thought: Let me verify the database is actually down.
Database is confirmed down. This is blocking test execution.
steps.observation:
● postgresql.service - PostgreSQL RDBMS
   Loaded: loaded
   Active: inactive (dead)

steps.thought: PostgreSQL service is not running. Multiple critical failures.

arguments.command: echo 'FAILED: 3 tests with errors, 2 test suites never ran, database down' >> test-failure-report.txt

steps.thought: Let me count total issues found.

arguments.command: echo 'Total Issues: 5 (3 test failures + 2 missing suites)' >> test-failure-report.txt

steps.thought: Let me create a summary for reporting.
steps.observation:
Status: FAILED
- Success Rate: 40% (2/5 tests passed)
Total Issues: 5 (3 test failures + 2 missing suites)

steps.thought: Let me verify the final test count.
Final confirmation: 60% failure rate (3/5 failed). This is a critical failure.

steps.thought: Tests have FAILED. Must report accurately with all failure details.

arguments.message: Integration test suite FAILED. Results: 3 tests FAILED with errors (TypeError, ReferenceError, database connection refused), only 2 tests passed (40% success rate). Critical issues: 1) TypeError in PUT /api/users/:id, 2) ReferenceError in DELETE endpoint, 3) Database unavailable (ECONNREFUSED). Additionally, 2 test suites (database.test.js and auth.test.js) never executed. Test suite did NOT meet success criteria.
